EXE/2025/00001.title: Tower Bridge refurbishment
EXE/2025/00001.summary: Application for temporary exemption during bridge maintenance work. The Port of London Authority requires permission to conduct underwater inspections and minor repairs to the Tower Bridge foundation structures.

general.description: Routine maintenance and inspection of bridge underwater structures

notes.note: Initial review completed. All documentation appears to be in order.
notes.author: Alex Morrison

EXE/2025/00002.title: South coast sea-sampling campaign
EXE/2025/00002.summary: Marine sampling operation off the south coast for environmental monitoring purposes. Survey includes water quality testing and marine life assessment.

general.description: Environmental monitoring and water quality assessment

notes.note: Site visit scheduled for next week. Coordination with local authorities required.
notes.author: Priya Patel

notes.note: High priority case due to time-sensitive nature of sampling.
notes.author: Priya Patel

EXE/2025/00003.title: Westhaven Bay pipe maintenance
EXE/2025/00003.summary: Routine maintenance of underwater pipes in Westhaven Bay area. Work includes inspection, cleaning, and minor repairs as needed.

notes.note: Case under review. Awaiting additional technical documentation.
notes.author: Daniel O'Sullivan

EXE/2025/00004.title: Replacement of single pile
EXE/2025/00004.summary: Replacement of a single deteriorated pile in Tynemouth port area. Work completed successfully with minimal environmental impact.

general.description: Single pile replacement due to structural deterioration

notes.note: Work completed successfully. Site inspection confirms minimal environmental impact.
notes.author: Sadia Khan

notes.note: Application approved. Work can proceed as planned.
notes.author: Sadia Khan

EXE/2025/00005.title: Worthing dive sites marker buoys
EXE/2025/00005.summary: Installation of marker buoys at designated dive sites near Worthing. Buoys will help identify safe diving areas and protect marine environment.

general.description: Installation of dive site marker buoys

notes.note: Case scheduled for review. Coordinating with local diving authorities.
notes.author: Michael Grant

EXE/2025/00006.title: King Point Marina mooring piles removal
EXE/2025/00006.summary: Removal of old mooring piles at King Point Marina. Work includes safe extraction and disposal of deteriorated structures.

general.description: Removal of deteriorated mooring pile structures

notes.note: Environmental impact assessment required before proceeding.
notes.author: Emma Thompson

EXE/2025/00007.title: Dead seal removal
EXE/2025/00007.summary: Urgent removal of deceased marine mammal from Dover port area. Coordination with marine wildlife authorities required.

general.description: Emergency removal of deceased marine mammal

notes.note: Wildlife authorities contacted. Removal scheduled for tomorrow morning.
notes.author: James Carter

notes.note: Urgent priority due to health and safety concerns.
notes.author: James Carter
